description: Pointed leather loafers from arrow for men with a refined, stacked heel and brogue detailing. A spin off from the classic penny loafers, this mid-top pair has an elasticated split above its mouth. Wear this with formal ensembles.UpperLeather upper with stitch detailingSlip on styling with elasticated seam above the tongue for ease of wearabilityLeather liningPadded tongueSoft sockliner for instep comfortBrand badge on the midfootMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heelBranding grooves on the forefoot for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
